title: Literature Review
description: Conducted an extensive literature review on dairy analogues, examining current innovations, ingredient technologies, nutritional profiles, consumer acceptance, and market trends. Collected, organized, and analyzed secondary research data using statistical tools including IBM SPSS and Origin Pro to identify patterns, research gaps, and emerging opportunities within the alternative dairy sector. The project strengthened skills in scientific literature evaluation, data interpretation, and evidence-based research methodology.

title: FReSH
description: A food ordering platform enabling ingredient-level filtering for allergen safety and dietary transparency in India's restaurant delivery market. Built with a freemium model: free for consumers, subscription-based for food business operators. Features a community accountability system and restaurant intelligence dashboard.

title: RTS Beverage Risk Analysis Video
description: A comprehensive risk analysis of Ready-To-Serve beverage formulations, examining preservative interactions, pH stability, and microbial safety thresholds. Used Origin Pro for statistical modelling.

title: SR² Labs
description: An AI-powered pathogen early warning system concept for food safety in India. Designed to use predictive modelling and supply chain data to flag contamination risks before they become public health crises.

title: Blog on Recalls in Bakery and Confectionery Industry
description: A website built on recalls in the bakery and confectionery industry in Indian and the US. This required research about the cause of recalls and the actions taken to prevent them.

title: Functional Beetroot Chips
description: Developed a functional snack using beetroot as the primary ingredient, optimising for antioxidant retention post-processing. Formulated recipe, conducted shelf-life studies, and performed sensory evaluation with consumer panels.
